title: Postal Scales,440lbs x 10g Digital postage scales,Durable Alloy Steel Platform,Heavy Duty Scales for Packages/Warehouse/Luggage,Parcel scales with LCD/Hold/Tare function,batteries&USB Powered
features: Heavy Duty Shipping Scale - Max. Capacity: 440lbs/200kg, Min. Readability: 40g/1.4oz, Accuracy: 10g/0.35oz. Permissible Error: +/- 10g. Made of durable Alloy Steel, moisture and corrosion resistant.
Digital Postal Scale - 3 weighing Modes:kg/lb/lb: oz. with adjustable Auto-off function.Backlit LCD display can be wall-mounted or put on the floor to support different usage scenarios.

Large Durable Alloy Steel Platform-Parcel weighing scales are Made of durable steel with high weight capacity. 4 non-slip feet for balance. Smoothly holds large fragile items, beloved pets, or moving items.
Hold & Tare Function - Easy push-button one-touch operation,for multiple weighing needs. Post office, warehouse, small business, commercial use.

User Friendly Design - Ships pre-calibrated, also can be easily calibrated. 2 Ways of power supply,batteries or USB cable(Included).When the battery is dead, you can use the USB power supply to continue using it without replacing it.
description: Product Description Backlit LCD & 3 Units Clear and fast readings day and night,Press MODE to easily convert between kg/lb/lb:oz Durable Alloy Steel Platform Parcel scales made of durable steel with strong load-bearing capacity,non-slip pattern and corrosion resistance 4*Anti-skip Padding Postal scales are equipped with anti-slip pads on the back, more stable, preventing tilting and slipping Wall Mounting Optional Can be wall mounted, two power supply modes to choose from, no need to worry about the battery is out of power can not be used Previous page Next page HOLD&TARE Function: Weighing Made Easy HOLD FUNCTION The postage scale locks the weight on the display with a hold function for easy reading of the weight. TARE FUNCTION Tare function easily zero out container weight to get net weight. Enhances packing, calculating, and shipping efficiency.
